en: Do you know how to use this English word?
ko: 이 영어 단어 어떻게 쓰는지 알아?

en: It's a verb that means to leave a job or position by telling your employer you are quitting.
ko: Resign, resign. 고용주에게 그만두겠다고 말하고 직장이나 직위를 떠나는 뜻의

en: Here's an example. Resign from the restaurant.
Resign from the restaurant. I've decided to resign from the restaurant to travel.
I've decided to resign from the restaurant to travel.
I've decided to resign from the restaurant to travel and test new recipes.
You want to resign with no plan?
Resign from the restaurant. Resign from the restaurant.
I've decided to resign from the restaurant to travel.
I've decided to resign from the restaurant to travel.
Great job! Follow English Class 101 for more English lessons.
ko: 잘했어! English Class 101을 팔로우해서 더 많은 영어 레슨을 받아봐.
